name: Sen. Jeff Merkley
subject: Up all night on Gorsuch nomination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Last night, I held the Senate floor for over 15 hours to oppose confirming Judge Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e169/2b07114c/5e4a0f6d/736cd783/3732997168/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dont-break-rules-for-gorsuch?source=DPE-20170405-Merkley-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend,

Last night, I held the Senate floor for over 15 hours to oppose confirming Judge Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court.

Republicans do not have the 60 votes required to confirm him. Now Mitch McConnell is threatening to invoke the "nuclear option" and change the Senate rules to force through his confirmation.

The integrity of the Supreme Court and the Senate is at stake here. If the GOP gets away with changing the rules to ram through this right wing activist judge to the first stolen seat in American history, our institutions will be deeply damaged forever.

[**Will you join me in telling Republicans not to change the rules to confirm Judge Gorsuch? Add your name now.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e169/2b07114c/5e4a0f6d/736cd783/3732997168/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dont-break-rules-for-gorsuch?source=DPE-20170405-Merkley-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")

There's a giant cloud hanging over this nomination. Donald Trump and his administration are under FBI investigation over connections to the Russian government. Judge Gorsuch should not be considered while the investigation is still ongoing -- and he certainly should not be confirmed if he fails to meet the 60 vote standard.

We cannot allow Republicans to turn our highest court in the land into a political committee.

**Please take action now: tell Republicans not to break the rules to put Judge Gorsuch on the Supreme Court:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/demand-60-votes**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e169/2b07114c/5e4a0f6d/736cd783/3732997168/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dont-break-rules-for-gorsuch?source=DPE-20170405-Merkley-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")

Thank you,
Sen. Jeff Merkley

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 4/06/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
President Donald J. Trump is honored to continue the tradition of hosting the annual Wounded Warriors Soldier Ride at the White House today. These brave warriors have risked all that they have to keep our people safe and our Democracy secure. We salute them. We salute their service. And we salute the flag they have so courageously protected.

**MORNING:**
* **8:55AM** : President Trump participates in the Wounded Warrior Project Soldier Ride

**AFTERNOON:**
* **2:35PM** : President Trump arrives in West Palm Beach, Florida
* **6:30PM** : President Trump and the First Lady have dinner with the President of the People's Republic of China Xi Jinping and Madame Peng Liyuan

**Add your name: tell the Senate to reject Judge Gorsuch's nomination.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170406_ke_nd&source=em_20170406_ke_nd")**

Later today, the Senate will vote on Neil Gorsuch's nomination to the Supreme Court. **[If you haven't already signed on to our petition opposing Neil Gorsuch, I need you to add your name right now.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+If+you+havent+already+signed+on+to+our+p&utm_campaign=em_20170406_ke_nd&source=em_20170406_ke_nd")**

**So let's use these final hours to put up a fight. Sign your name right now:**

Keith

Democrats are trying to BLOCK Neil Gorsuch from the Supreme Court. |

Friend, The Democrats are completely unhinged. For the first time in history, they are engaged in a partisan filibuster of a Supreme Court nominee. Judge Neil Gorsuch is an outstanding judge -- and it’s time for Chuck Schumer and Elizabeth Warren to stop preventing Judge Gorsuch from filling the ninth seat on the Supreme Court. Could you imagine if the roles were reversed and Republicans were standing on the Senate floor blocking a vote? The media would try to eat us alive. The only way to fight back against the Democrats’ filibuster is for the American people to step up and show your support for the Honorable Neil Gorsuch right now. Show your support for Neil Gorsuch as Democrats try to block our vote. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Congressman Bob Goodlatte Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 6th, 2017

**WARRENTON, VA - **Today, State Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for lieutenant governor, announced her endorsement by House Judiciary Chairman Congressman Bob Goodlatte of Virginia's Sixth District."Jill Vogel was born and raised in the Shenandoah Valley and has always stood for the values that matter to the people in the valley," said Congressman Bob Goodlatte. "Virginia needs a lieutenant governor who understands our values, our opportunities, and our challenges. Jill's strong conservative record in the Senate makes makes her the clear choice for lieutenant governor. I have the utmost confidence in Jill's vision for Virginia and am proud to strongly endorse her campaign for lieutenant governor. I urge all Republicans to support Jill Vogel in the June 13th primary.""I am honored to have Congressman Bob Goodlatte's endorsement and support," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "For many years, Bob has led on important issues, such as balancing our budget, easing regulatory burdens, and protecting Virginia agriculture. I look forward to working with him on important economic and regulatory issues for which we need a federal partner helping Virginians get Washington out of our way."Congressman Bob Goodlatte currently serves as Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee and formerly chaired the House Committee on Agriculture. While serving the Sixth District, Bob has worked to advance conservative principles that uphold the basic foundations of America. Whether it is his sponsorship of a balanced budget amendment, his work to protect Second Amendment rights, or supporting pro-growth, pro-jobs policies that promote competition and innovation and remove government barriers to private sector job creation, Bob is committed to advancing policies that reflect the priorities of the Sixth District.
###

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE April 6th, 2017 WARRENTON, VA - Today, State Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for lieutenant governor, announced her endorsement by House Judiciary Chairman Congressman Bob Goodlatte of Virginia's Sixth District."Jill Vogel was born and raised in the Shenandoah Valley and has always stood for the values that matter to the people in the valley," said Congressman Bob Goodlatte. "Virginia needs a lieutenant governor who understands our values, our opportunities, and our challenges. Jill's strong conservative record in the Senate makes makes her the clear choice for lieutenant governor. I have the utmost confidence in Jill's vision for Virginia and am proud to strongly endorse her campaign for lieutenant governor. I urge all Republicans to support Jill Vogel in the June 13th primary.""I am honored to have Congressman Bob Goodlatte's endorsement and support," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "For many years, Bob has led on important issues, such as balancing our budget, easing regulatory burdens, and protecting Virginia agriculture. I look forward to working with him on important economic and regulatory issues for which we need a federal partner helping Virginians get Washington out of our way."Congressman Bob Goodlatte currently serves as Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee and formerly chaired the House Committee on Agriculture. While serving the Sixth District, Bob has worked to advance conservative principles that uphold the basic foundations of America. name: Tom Perez
subject: I've had enough of Senate Republicans. Let's take our majority back.
body:
Help Democrats take back control of the Senate
---
**Pitch in whatever you can to help Democrats take back the Senate in 2018:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c90a/4067b0a/2ee319a04/7e73e9cd/1549757385/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170406_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170406_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170406_tp_v1s1")**
Friend --

Senate Republicans just went nuclear. And the American people are their collateral damage.

When the Senate gaveled in this morning, Neil Gorsuch did not have the 60 votes needed to be confirmed to the Supreme Court. But rather than changing the candidate and finding someone worthy to sit on the Court -- someone who isn't indebted to corporations or billionaire backers, someone who believes in protecting the rights of workers, women, and LGBT people -- they decided to invoke the "nuclear option" and confirmed him to a lifetime appointment on a 51-vote Republican majority.

If you're asking yourself "can they really do that?" -- the answer is yes, they can and they just did.

Frankly, I've had enough of Republicans abusing the power of their majority -- so let's throw them out. Pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats and take back the Senate. I know we can do it, but we need to get started right now.

name: Ben Cohen via OurRevolution.com
subject: Stamp money out of politics & stop Gorsuch
body:
Gorsuch's support for the use of unlimited and unaccountable money in politics
#
Sisters and Brothers:
Hi, it's Ben, the guy on the left, co-founder of Ben & Jerry's Ice Cream, and Head Stamper at Stamp Stampede.
The Supreme Court sided with billionaires when it ruled on _Citizens United v. F.E.C._ , a landmark case that created Super PACs and opened the floodgates of dark money pouring into our political elections.
Over the past several weeks, ads funded by the same untraceable dark money have propped up Supreme Court nominee Neil Gorsuch to push him through his Senate confirmation hearing. Gorsuch's support for the use of unlimited and unaccountable money in politics weakens our Constitution and the right of free speech for all people. We need a Supreme Court justice who will stand on our side.
**[Overturning Citizens United won't happen with Judge Gorsuch on the bench. Will you contribute $5 to receive an ink stamp so you can help Stamp Money Out of Politics?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a9c/43f17890/dc8f963f/6203e170/342385260/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stampout?refcode=em170406-stampfull")**

Judge Gorsuch is the wrong choice for the Supreme Court. His support has led us to a point where accepted facts on climate change, reproductive health, immigration and many other issues are being slandered by our elected officials and the entities supporting their extreme positions. It's our job to fight back and show all of them that the Supreme Court of the United States must stand for the people, not the proliferation of wealth by the top one percent.
Corporate interests have used shadowy Super PACs to hide the puppeteers' bankrolling efforts that erode the very foundation of our democracy. There are now over 65,000 Americans who are using rubber stamps to make their voices heard by turning money into media. It's a "Petition on Steroids" because each stamped dollar is seen by 875 people.
We have shown the power of our movement at rallies, protests, town halls and every place in between -- now we can grow it person to person, through this viral act of protest.
**[Help to grow our movement by donating $5. You will receive a free Stamp Money Out of Politics stamp you can use on all paper currency.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a9c/43f17890/dc8f963f/6203e170/342385260/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stampout?refcode=em170406-stampfull")**
Thank you. Your efforts make all the difference for the political revolution.

clean_body: Gorsuch's support for the use of unlimited and unaccountable money in politics Sisters and Brothers: Hi, it's Ben, the guy on the left, co-founder of Ben & Jerry's Ice Cream, and Head Stamper at Stamp Stampede. The Supreme Court sided with billionaires when it ruled on Citizens United v. F.E.C. , a landmark case that created Super PACs and opened the floodgates of dark money pouring into our political elections. Over the past several weeks, ads funded by the same untraceable dark money have propped up Supreme Court nominee Neil Gorsuch to push him through his Senate confirmation hearing. Gorsuch's support for the use of unlimited and unaccountable money in politics weakens our Constitution and the right of free speech for all people. We need a Supreme Court justice who will stand on our side. "" "" "" Judge Gorsuch is the wrong choice for the Supreme Court. His support has led us to a point where accepted facts on climate change, reproductive health, immigration and many other issues are being slandered by our elected officials and the entities supporting their extreme positions. It's our job to fight back and show all of them that the Supreme Court of the United States must stand for the people, not the proliferation of wealth by the top one percent. Corporate interests have used shadowy Super PACs to hide the puppeteers' bankrolling efforts that erode the very foundation of our democracy. There are now over 65,000 Americans who are using rubber stamps to make their voices heard by turning money into media. It's a "Petition on Steroids" because each stamped dollar is seen by 875 people. We have shown the power of our movement at rallies, protests, town halls and every place in between -- now we can grow it person to person, through this viral act of protest. "" Thank you. Your efforts make all the difference for the political revolution. Ben Cohen Stamp Stampede via Our Revolution P.S.: "" Adding our political message to paper currency is an effective, legal way to help build our movement to get big money out of politics. body:
Mitch McConnell just broke Senate rules to force through Judge Gorsuch's Supreme Court appointment. Here is how we fight back:
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gorsuch-loss?refcode=DPE-20170406-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Team --

All week, Democrats have come to Senate floor, one after another, to speak out against appointing Judge Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. Senator Jeff Merkley even held the floor for **15 hours** in opposition.

We had the votes to block this appointment. But just now, Mitch McConnell took the outrageous step of breaking the Senate rules and forcing through Judge Gorsuch's confirmation with less than 60 votes.

Our Democratic senators stood with you to stop this, Team, and they aren't going to back down now. But they need all of us standing together with them in this fight.

**[Chip in $1 to elect Democratic senators in 2018 who can stand up to Mitch McConnell and resist his partisan power grabs.](https://secure.dscc. Donald Trump nominated a judge with such an extreme record of putting corporations ahead of working people that he couldn't be confirmed under the same bipartisan standard every single one of President Obama's nominees were held to.

But instead of selecting a new nominee, Trump and his Republican allies in the Senate forced through his confirmation anyway.

If the Republicans won't play by the rules, then the only way for us to fight back is with thousands of Democratic supporters uniting to hold them accountable and elect Democrats in 2018.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Join the National Tax March
body:
an economy that works for all of us at the Tax March
#
Sisters and Brothers,
There is gross injustice in America's tax system today. The top one percent and multinational corporations hide their wealth overseas, bankrupting the country of billions of dollars in tax revenue. In just forty years, their greed has led to a declining infrastructure, chronically underfunded public education, cuts to vital social safety nets and environmental protections, and so much more.
Our Revolution is joining the Tax March in Washington and cities all across the country. [**Join the National Tax March and demand the top one percent stop selling out the next generation for their own profit.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a9d/43f17890/dc837c1d/6203e1a7/3412731490/VEsH/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/national-march-in-dc?source=em170406-ourrev")
[**National Tax March**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a9d/43f17890/dc837c1d/6203e1a7/3412731490/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/national-march-in-dc?source=em170406-ourrev")
US Capitol West Front Lawn
1 First St NW, Washington, DC 20510
Saturday, April 15, 12:00PM - 2:30PM EDT
**[RSVP TO ATTEND»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a9d/43f17890/dc837c1d/6203e1a7/3412731490/VEsF/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/national-march-in-dc?source=em170406-ourrev")**
Decades of greed from the millionaire and billionaire class have culminated in crisis. In the wealthiest country in the history of the world, the one percent is raking in nearly all new income. Their greed has to end. Our fight for economic justice, for tax justice and an economy that works for all of us at the Tax March is the next critical step to opening our government back up to its people.
Our movement's success depends on all of us lifting each other up. We recognize that unique sets of barriers have held communities of color, women, people with disabilities, immigrants and the LGBTQIA community back, and that economic justice must come for all of us at once. Organizers of the Tax March represent a broad cross-section of America, and we need you to join us too.
[**Sign up to join the National Tax March in Washington on April 15 and demand a tax system that works for all of us, not just the top one percent.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a9d/43f17890/dc837c1d/6203e1a7/3412731490/VEsC/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/national-march-in-dc?source=em170406-ourrev")
Thank you for joining us in taking this critical action.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Fwd: Republicans just went nuclear
body:
Tom's message on Gorsuch's confirmation
---
**Pitch in whatever you can to help Democrats take back the Senate in 2018:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c91c/4067b0a/2edabf633/7e73caa1/2684729312/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170406_ke2_nd&source=em_20170406_ke2_nd&refcode=em_20170406_ke2_nd")**
Friend --

When Republicans couldn't get 60 votes to confirm Neil Gorsuch, they should have gotten a new nominee. Instead, they changed the rules.

**[I'm with Tom -- it's high time to get Donald Trump's Republican allies out of the Senate and elect a Democratic majority that won't appease his anti-working family agenda.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c91c/4067b0a/2edabf633/7e73caae/2684729312/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Im+with+Tom++its+high+time+to+get+Donald&utm_campaign=em_20170406_ke2_nd&source=em_20170406_ke2_nd&refcode=em_20170406_ke2_nd")**

I know 2018 sounds like it's a long way away, but the reality is that this campaign has already started -- and I guarantee the GOP is going to do everything they can to hold on to their power.

In fact, just a few hours after Mitch McConnell invoked the "nuclear option," Republicans announced that they raised $53 million in the first three months of 2017 for the Republican National Committee and Donald Trump's re-election campaign (yes, that's already happening too).

Some of that $53 million probably came in big checks from billionaire donors and special interests, but a lot of it was grassroots support. So if we're going to take on Republicans and win, Democrats have to match it.

**We can't do it without you -- chip in $3 or more and let's take back the Senate:**

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c91c/4067b0a/2edabf633/7e73caaf/2684729312/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170406_ke2_nd&source=em_20170406_ke2_nd&refcode=em_20170406_ke2_nd")**
Thanks,

Keith

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Sender: Tom Perez
Date: Thu, Apr 6, 2017
Subject: Republicans just went nuclear

Friend --

Senate Republicans just went nuclear. And the American people are their collateral damage.

When the Senate gaveled in this morning, Neil Gorsuch did not have the 60 votes needed to be confirmed to the Supreme Court. But rather than changing the candidate and finding someone worthy to sit on the Court -- someone who isn't indebted to corporations or billionaire backers, someone who believes in protecting the rights of workers, women, and LGBT people -- they decided to invoke the "nuclear option" and confirmed him to a lifetime appointment on a 51-vote Republican majority.

If you're asking yourself "can they really do that?" -- the answer is yes, they can and they just did.

Frankly, I've had enough of Republicans abusing the power of their majority -- so let's throw them out. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats and take back the Senate. I know we can do it, but we need to get started right now.
